'''nobapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wageable|wageable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wageable|wageable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nobapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobapithi|nobapithi]] || [[word:nobapiji|nobapiji]] || [[word:nobapishi|nobapishi]] || [[word:nobapiki|nobapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobaputhuthu|nobaputhuthu]] || [[word:nobapujuju|nobapujuju]] || [[word:nobapushushu|nobapushushu]] || [[word:nobapukuku|nobapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobaputhu|nobaputhu]] || [[word:nobapuju|nobapuju]] || [[word:nobapushu|nobapushu]] || [[word:nobapuku|nobapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobapufthuf|nobapufthuf]] || [[word:nobapufjuf|nobapufjuf]] || [[word:nobapufshuf|nobapufshuf]] || [[word:nobapufkuf|nobapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobapethe|nobapethe]] || [[word:nobapeje|nobapeje]] || [[word:nobapeshe|nobapeshe]] || [[word:nobapeke|nobapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobapothotho|nobapothotho]] || [[word:nobapojojo|nobapojojo]] || [[word:nobaposhosho|nobaposhosho]] || [[word:nobapokoko|nobapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobapotho|nobapotho]] || [[word:nobapojo|nobapojo]] || [[word:nobaposho|nobaposho]] || [[word:nobapoko|nobapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobapofthof|nobapofthof]] || [[word:nobapofjof|nobapofjof]] || [[word:nobapofshof|nobapofshof]] || [[word:nobapofkof|nobapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfthÃŸf|nobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfjÃŸf|nobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfshÃŸf|nobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfkÃŸf|nobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfthÃŸf|nobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfjÃŸf|nobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfshÃŸf|nobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfkÃŸf|nobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfthÃŸf|nobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfjÃŸf|nobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfshÃŸf|nobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobapÃŸfkÃŸf|nobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobapÃḊthÃḊ|nobapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nobapÃḊjÃḊ|nobapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nobapÃḊshÃḊ|nobapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nobapÃḊkÃḊ|nobapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobapathatha|nobapathatha]] || [[word:nobapajaja|nobapajaja]] || [[word:nobapashasha|nobapashasha]] || [[word:nobapakaka|nobapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobapatha|nobapatha]] || [[word:nobapaja|nobapaja]] || [[word:nobapasha|nobapasha]] || [[word:nobapaka|nobapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobapafthaf|nobapafthaf]] || [[word:nobapafjaf|nobapafjaf]] || [[word:nobapafshaf|nobapafshaf]] || [[word:nobapafkaf|nobapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nobapasha|nobapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobapshÃḋsha|nobapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobaprosha|nobaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobapmusha|nobapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobapyasha|nobapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobapnkshÃḋsha|gonobapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobapnkrosha|gonobapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobapnkmusha|gonobapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobapnkyasha|gonobapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nobabapasha|nobabapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobabapshÃḋsha|nobabapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobabaprosha|nobabaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobabapmusha|nobabapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobabapyasha|nobabapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobabapnkshÃḋsha|gonobabapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobabapnkrosha|gonobabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobabapnkmusha|gonobabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobabapnkyasha|gonobabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nebÃḊpasha|nebÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nebÃḊpshÃḋsha|nebÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nebÃḊprosha|nebÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nebÃḊpmusha|nebÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nebÃḊpyasha|nebÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gonebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonebÃḊpnkrosha|gonebÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonebÃḊpnkmusha|gonebÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonebÃḊpnkyasha|gonebÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nobfapasha|nobfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobfapshÃḋsha|nobfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobfaprosha|nobfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobfapmusha|nobfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobfapyasha|nobfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobfapnkshÃḋsha|gonobfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobfapnkrosha|gonobfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobfapnkmusha|gonobfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobfapnkyasha|gonobfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
